channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: No Fooling, ‘Spaceballs 2’ Will Hit Theaters April 2027
item.description: Trust in the Schwartz: 'Spaceballs 2' is over a year out from hitting the big screen and making you laugh your ass off.

item.title: I Regret to Inform You That the Artemis II Astronauts Are Having Lots of Screen Time
item.description: Going to the moon now involves iPhones and Microsoft Surface tablets.

item.title: OCSF explained: The shared data language security teams have been missing
item.description: The security industry has spent the last year talking about models, copilots, and agents, but a quieter shift is happening one layer below all of that: Vendors are lining up around a shared way to describe security data. The Open Cybersecurity Schema Framework (OCSF), is emerging as one of the strongest candidates for that job.It gives vendors, enterprises, and practitioners a common way to represent security events, findings, objects, and context. That means less time rewriting field names and custom parsers and more time correlating detections, running analytics, and building workflows that ...

item.title: Tesla casse les prix, innovations solaires et bons plans vélos : l’actualité électrique de la semaine – Récap’ Survoltés
item.description: Cette semaine, l’actualité Survoltés a été particulièrement marquée par les stratégies tarifaires de Tesla, les nouveautés écologiques de Decathlon et les avancées scientifiques sur le solaire. Voici un résumé des contenus les plus lus de la semaine, à retrouver dans ce Récap’ Survoltés complet.

item.title: The Dreame Miracle Pro finally gives my scalp and hair the attention they deserve
item.description: The Dreame Miracle Pro feels genuinely different – a dryer that actually improves how your hair looks and feels

item.title: A folk musician became a target for AI fakes and a copyright troll
item.description: In January, folk artist Murphy Campbell discovered several songs on her Spotify profile that did not belong there. They were songs that she had recorded, but she'd never uploaded them to Spotify, and something was off about the vocals. She quickly surmised that someone had pulled performances of the songs she posted to YouTube, created […]

item.title: Ireland is testing out a digital wallet that conducts age verification for social media users
item.description: Before it's publicly available later this year, the Irish government is trialing its Government Digital Wallet, which includes a way to verify a user's age to access social media platforms. In its press release, the government's Department of Public Expediture, Infrastructure, Public Service Reform and Digitalisation said people can store digital versions of their birth certificates, driving licenses, European health cards and more. Frank Feighan, the department's minister, said that this testing phase would help inform the development of the digital wallet and ensure it was user friendly. The...

item.title: Ce chargeur 5-en-1 (45 W) à -23 % est l’accessoire ultime pour recharger tous vos appareils
item.description: On adore quand un accessoire du quotidien devient vraiment utile sans coûter un bras et en ce moment, c’est le cas avec l'Ugreen Zapix 45 W. C’est un petit chargeur compact qui est équipé de 5 ports, et dont le prix chute à 17 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: RuPauls Drag Race Season 18 faces backlash over alleged AI use
item.description: "RuPaul's Drag Race" Season 18 featured portraits of its contestants. Fans believe they were AI-generated.

item.title: Apple iOS 26.5 public beta is now available
item.description: Apple has released the first public beta for iOS 26.5, just a few days after the beta for developers came out. One of the biggest changes the new operating system brings is the “Suggested Places” feature in Apple Maps. It will show you trending places to visit, such as restaurants and other establishments, near your location or based on your search history. You can see Suggested Places when you tap on the search bar in the Maps app. iOS 26.5 beta also will also come with notifications that the company will be putting ads inside Maps. Apple confirmed in March that it was going to expand its ads...

item.title: Quels sont les meilleurs chargeurs sans fil à induction pour smartphone en 2026 ?
item.description: La charge sans fil est désormais plus largement répandue pour les smartphones et les accessoires. Voici notre sélection des meilleurs chargeurs sans fil pour recharger tranquillement votre smartphone Android, votre iPhone ou encore vos écouteurs ou votre montre connectée.

item.title: The LG G6 OLED TV got a picture-changing firmware update before its release, so I tested it side-by-side with the G5 again — here's what happened
item.description: The G6 OLED got a picture tweak ahead of its launch, so here's the latest on how it performs
